---
title: "Bacterial Genomics & Antimicrobial Resistance Workshop"
description: "Teaching Assistant"
image: "teaching_ngs.jpeg"
format:
  html:
    includes:
      in_header: style.css
      before_body: cover.html
---
<script type="text/javascript">
document.write(`
<!-- Background Image with Gradient Overlay -->
<div id="intro-section" style="position: relative; text-align: center; color: white;">
<!-- Slideshow Background with the images -->
<div class="slideshow-container">

  <!-- Slide 1 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_1.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 2 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_2.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 3 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_3.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 4 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_4.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 5 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_5.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 6 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_6.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 7 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_7.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 8 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_8.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 9 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_9.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 10 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_10.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 11 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_11.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>

  <!-- Slide 12 -->
  <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/Bacterial_Genomics_&_Antimicrobial_Resistance_Workshop/bacterial_genomics_12.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;">
  </div>
</div>

    
<!-- Text Overlay on the Background Image -->
<div style="position: absolute; top: 80%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); text-align: center; width: 100%;">
    <h1 style="font-size: 2.5em; font-weight: bold; color: white; margin-bottom: 20px;">Bacterial Genomics & Antimicrobial Resistance Workshop</h1>
    <p style="font-size: 1.2em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.8; text-align: justify; color: white; padding: 0 20px;">
        This five-day workshop provides participants with a comprehensive overview of bacterial genomics and its applications in antimicrobial resistance research. Through lectures and hands-on sessions, participants will learn how to analyze bacterial genomes for antimicrobial resistance and virulence factors, conduct comparative genomic analysis, and apply bacterial genomics to clinical and scientific problems. The workshop will commence on 30th June and run till 4th July 2024. Application deadline: 22nd June 2024.
    </p>
</div>

</div>


<!-- Structured Program Details Below the Image -->
<div id="program-details" style="padding: 20px 120px; background-color: #f9f9f9; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  <h2 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold; font-size: 2em; margin-bottom: 20px;">Program Outline & Learning Objectives</h2>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1em;">
    <li><strong>Day 1:</strong> Introduction to bacterial genomics and bioinformatics</li>
    <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 80px;"> <!-- Indented by 80px -->
      <li><strong>1.1 Jupyter Notebook:</strong> Installation, Keyboard Shortcuts, Formatting, Text Styling</li>
      <li><strong>1.2 Conda:</strong> Managing environments and packages</li>
      <li><strong>1.3 Linux Introduction:</strong> Commands, permissions, text processing</li>
    </ul>
    <li><strong>Day 2:</strong> Bacterial Genome Analysis: From sequence data to genomes</li>
    <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 80px;"> <!-- Indented by 80px -->
      <li><strong>2.1 FastQC:</strong> Data quality check</li>
      <li><strong>2.2 Trimmomatic:</strong> Adapter trimming for paired and single-end reads</li>
      <li><strong>2.3 Unicycler:</strong> Genome assembly and results interpretation</li>
      <li><strong>2.4 Prokka:</strong> Genome annotation and submission to NCBI</li>
    </ul>
    <li><strong>Day 3:</strong> Bacterial Genome Analysis for Antimicrobial Resistance</li>
    <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 80px;"> <!-- Indented by 80px -->
      <li><strong>3.1 ResFinder:</strong> Identifying AMR genes</li>
      <li><strong>3.2 VFDB and VirulenceFinder:</strong> Identifying virulence genes</li>
      <li><strong>3.3 MLST:</strong> Multi-locus sequence typing</li>
    </ul>
    <li><strong>Day 4:</strong> Comparative Genomics and Phylogenetics</li>
    <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 80px;"> <!-- Indented by 80px -->
      <li><strong>4.1 Short Read Alignment:</strong> Mapping reads to reference genomes</li>
      <li><strong>4.2 Variant Calling:</strong> Identification of genetic variants</li>
      <li><strong>4.3 RAxML:</strong> Phylogenetic tree building</li>
      <li><strong>4.4 iTOL:</strong> Visualization of phylogenetic trees</li>
    </ul>
    <li><strong>Day 5:</strong> Application of Bacterial Genomics</li>
    <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 80px;"> <!-- Indented by 80px -->
      <li><strong>5.1 Pathogenwatch:</strong> Exploring genomics-based pathogen surveillance</li>
    </ul>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.2em; margin-top: 40px;">Workshop Schedule</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 120px; font-size: 1em;">
    <li><strong>Day 1:</strong> Introduction to bacterial genomics and bioinformatics</li>
    <li><strong>Day 2:</strong> Bacterial genome analysis: from sequence data to genomes</li>
    <li><strong>Day 3:</strong> Bacterial genome analysis for antimicrobial resistance</li>
    <li><strong>Day 4:</strong> Comparative genomics and phylogenetics</li>
    <li><strong>Day 5:</strong> Application of bacterial genomics</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.2em; margin-top: 40px;">Workshop Duration & Location</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em;">Duration: 4 days <br> Location: CHRF-HQ, Shyamoli, Dhaka, Bangladesh</p>


  <p style="text-align: center;">
    <a href="https://chrfbd.org/blogs/4f86dc07-664d-4182-a349-218b0c4249e5" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2" style="padding: 15px 30px; font-size: .8em; text-decoration: none;">Program Website</a>
  </p>
</div>
`);
</script>

<!-- Add additional details if required -->
<style>
  #program-details {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.8;
    padding: 100px; /* Added more padding on the left */
    background-color: #f9f9f9;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-size: 1.2em;
  }
  
  h2, h3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: center;
  }

  ul ul {
    margin-left: 60px; /* Increased indentation */
  }

  p {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* Slideshow container */
  .slideshow-container {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Each slide */
  .mySlides {
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out;
  }

  .mySlides:first-child {
    opacity: 1;
  }
</style>

<script>
  let slideIndex = 0;
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.mySlides');
  
  function showSlides() {
    slides.forEach((slide) => {
      slide.style.opacity = '0';  // Hide all slides
    });
    slideIndex++;
    if (slideIndex > slides.length) { slideIndex = 1; }  // Loop back to first slide
    slides[slideIndex - 1].style.opacity = '1';  // Show the current slide
    setTimeout(showSlides, 3000);  // Change image every 3 seconds
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    showSlides();  // Initialize the slideshow
  });
</script>
